subject.group_invite: [Family Planner] You've been invited to the {groupName} group

verification.body1: Email verification is required to complete your Family Planner registration.
verification.body2: Please enter the 6-digit verification code below to verify your email.
verification.body3: Enter the code above in the app or website.
verification.warning_text: This verification code is valid for 24 hours only.
verification.footer1: This email was automatically sent upon registration.
verification.footer2: If you did not register, please ignore this email.

password_reset.body1: You have requested a password reset.
password_reset.body2: Please enter the 6-digit verification code below to reset your password.
password_reset.body3: Enter the code above in the app or website.
password_reset.warning_text: This verification code is valid for 1 hour only.
password_reset.security_text: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email and review your account security immediately.
password_reset.footer1: This email was automatically sent upon a password reset request.
password_reset.footer2: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.

group_invite.title: You've received a group invitation!
group_invite.body1: {inviterName} has invited you to join a group.
group_invite.body2: You can join the group using the invite code below.
group_invite.step1: Log in to the Family Planner app or website
group_invite.expiry_text: The invite code is valid for 7 days.
group_invite.footer1: This email was automatically sent when a group invitation was made.
group_invite.footer2: If you do not wish to join the group, please ignore this email.
